144: type TokenCache struct {
145: 	mu       sync.RWMutex
146: 	tokens   map[string]*tokenEntry
147: 	capacity int
148: 	ttl      time.Duration
149: }
150: 
151: type tokenEntry struct {
152: 	username   string
153: 	lastAccess time.Time
154: }
155: 
156: func NewTokenCache(capacity int, ttl time.Duration) *TokenCache {
157: 	return &TokenCache{
158: 		tokens:   make(map[string]*tokenEntry),
159: 		capacity: capacity,
160: 		ttl:      ttl,
161: 	}
162: }
163: 
164: func (tc *TokenCache) Get(token string) (string, bool) {
165: 	tc.mu.RLock()
166: 	defer tc.mu.RUnlock()
167: 	entry, ok := tc.tokens[token]
168: 	if !ok {
169: 		return "", false
170: 	}
171: 	if time.Since(entry.lastAccess) > tc.ttl {
172: 		return "", false
173: 	}
174: 	entry.lastAccess = time.Now()
175: 	return entry.username, true
176: }
177: 
178: func (tc *TokenCache) Set(token, username string) {
179: 	tc.mu.Lock()
180: 	defer tc.mu.Unlock()
181: 	tc.tokens[token] = &tokenEntry{
182: 		username:   username,
183: 		lastAccess: time.Now(),
184: 	}
185: }

188: 	k8sClient *K8sClient
189: 	store     store.Store
190: 	watchers  map[types.NamespacedName]chan struct{}
191: 	mu        sync.RWMutex
192: }

194: func NewSandboxReconciler(k8sClient *K8sClient, store store.Store) *SandboxReconciler {
195: 	return &SandboxReconciler{
196: 		k8sClient: k8sClient,
197: 		store:     store,
198: 		watchers:  make(map[types.NamespacedName]chan struct{}),
199: 	}
200: }
201: 
202: func (r *SandboxReconciler) WatchSandboxOnce(namespace, name string) <-chan struct{} {
203: 	key := types.NamespacedName{Namespace: namespace, Name: name}
204: 	ch := make(chan struct{}, 1)
205: 
206: 	r.mu.Lock()
207: 	r.watchers[key] = ch
208: 	r.mu.Unlock()
209: 
210: 	return ch
211: }
212: 
213: func (r *SandboxReconciler) NotifySandboxRunning(namespace, name string) {
214: 	key := types.NamespacedName{Namespace: namespace, Name: name}
215: 
216: 	r.mu.RLock()
217: 	ch, ok := r.watchers[key]
218: 	r.mu.RUnlock()
219: 
220: 	if ok {
221: 		select {
222: 		case ch <- struct{}{}:
223: 		default:
224: 		}
225: 	}
226: }
227: 
228: func (r *SandboxReconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req types.NamespacedName) error {
229: 	sandbox, err := r.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(SandboxGVR).Namespace(req.Namespace).Get(ctx, req.Name, metav1.GetOptions{})
230: 	if err != nil {
231: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
232: 			return nil
233: 		}
234: 		return err
235: 	}
236: 
237: 	status := sandbox.Object["status"]
238: 	if status == nil {
239: 		return nil
240: 	}
241: 
242: 	statusMap, ok := status.(map[string]interface{})
243: 	if !ok {
244: 		return nil
245: 	}
246: 
247: 	conditions, ok := statusMap["conditions"].([]interface{})
248: 	if !ok {
249: 		return nil
250: 	}
251: 
252: 	for _, c := range conditions {
253: 		cond, ok := c.(map[string]interface{})
254: 		if !ok {
255: 			continue
256: 		}
257: 		if cond["type"] == "Ready" && cond["status"] == "True" {
258: 			r.NotifySandboxRunning(req.Namespace, req.Name)
259: 			break
260: 		}
261: 	}
262: 
263: 	return nil
264: }

117: class CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient:
118:     """Client for Code Interpreter data plane operations."""
119: 
120:     def __init__(
121:         self,
122:         session_id: str,
123:         router_url: str,
124:         namespace: str = "default",
125:         code_interpreter_name: str = "code-interpreter",
126:         base_url: Optional[str] = None,
127:         timeout: float = DEFAULT_TIMEOUT,
128:         connect_timeout: float = DEFAULT_CONNECT_TIMEOUT,
129:     ):
130:         self.session_id = session_id
131:         self.timeout = timeout
132:         self.connect_timeout = connect_timeout
133: 
134:         if base_url:
135:             self.base_url = base_url.rstrip("/")
136:         else:
137:             self.base_url = urljoin(
138:                 router_url,
139:                 f"/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/code-interpreters/{code_interpreter_name}/invocations/",
140:             )
141: 
142:         self.session = requests.Session()
143:         adapter = HTTPAdapter(
144:             max_retries=Retry(total=3, backoff_factor=1, status_forcelist=[502, 503, 504]),
145:             pool_connections=10,
146:             pool_maxsize=100,
147:         )
148:         self.session.mount("http://", adapter)
149:         self.session.mount("https://", adapter)
150:         self.session.headers[SESSION_HEADER] = session_id
151: 
152:     def _request(
153:         self,
154:         method: str,
155:         path: str,
156:         json_data: Optional[Dict] = None,
157:         data: Optional[bytes] = None,
158:         files: Optional[Dict] = None,
159:         headers: Optional[Dict] = None,
160:         timeout: Optional[float] = None,
161:     ) -> Dict:
162:         """Make a request to the data plane."""
163:         url = urljoin(self.base_url, path)
164:         req_headers = dict(self.session.headers)
165:         if headers:
166:             req_headers.update(headers)
167: 
168:         effective_timeout = timeout if timeout is not None else self.timeout
169:         read_timeout = effective_timeout + 2.0
170: 
171:         resp = self.session.request(
172:             method,
173:             url,
174:             json=json_data,
175:             data=data,
176:             files=files,
177:             headers=req_headers,
178:             timeout=(self.connect_timeout, read_timeout),
179:         )
180:         resp.raise_for_status()
181:         return resp.json()
182: 
183:     def execute_command(
184:         self,
185:         command: List[str],
186:         timeout: Optional[float] = None,
187:         working_dir: Optional[str] = None,
188:         env: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
189:     ) -> Dict:
190:         """Execute a command in the sandbox."""
191:         effective_timeout = timeout if timeout is not None else self.timeout
192: 
193:         payload: Dict[str, Any] = {
194:             "command": command,
195:             "timeout": f"{int(effective_timeout)}s",
196:         }
197:         if working_dir:
198:             payload["working_dir"] = working_dir
199:         if env:
200:             payload["env"] = env
201: 
202:         result = self._request("POST", "api/execute", json_data=payload, timeout=effective_timeout)
203: 
204:         if result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0:
205:             raise CommandExecutionError(
206:                 exit_code=result["exit_code"],
207:                 stderr=result.get("stderr", ""),
208:                 command=command,
209:             )
210: 
211:         return result
212: 
213:     def write_file(self, path: str, content: bytes, mode: str = "0644") -> Dict:
214:         """Write a file to the sandbox."""
215:         encoded_content = base64.b64encode(content).decode("utf-8")
216: 
217:         return self._request(
218:             "POST",
219:             "api/files",
220:             json_data={
221:                 "path": path,
222:                 "content": encoded_content,
223:                 "mode": mode,
224:             },
225:         )
226: 
227:     def upload_file(self, path: str, file_path: str, mode: str = "0644") -> Dict:
228:         """Upload a file to the sandbox."""
229:         with open(file_path, "rb") as f:
230:             return self._request(
231:                 "POST",
232:                 "api/files",
233:                 files={"file": f},
234:                 data={"path": path, "mode": mode},
235:                 headers={SESSION_HEADER: self.session_id},
236:             )
237: 
238:     def download_file(self, path: str) -> bytes:
239:         """Download a file from the sandbox."""
240:         url = urljoin(self.base_url, f"api/files/{path.lstrip('/')}")
241:         resp = self.session.get(
242:             url,
243:             headers={SESSION_HEADER: self.session_id},
244:             timeout=(self.connect_timeout, self.timeout),
245:         )
246:         resp.raise_for_status()
247:         return resp.content
248: 
249:     def list_files(self, path: str) -> Dict:
250:         """List files in a directory."""
251:         return self._request("GET", f"api/files?path={path}")
252: 
253:     def close(self):
254:         """Close the HTTP session."""
255:         self.session.close()
256:

258: class CodeInterpreterClient:
259:     """High-level client for Code Interpreter sessions."""
260: 
261:     def __init__(
262:         self,
263:         router_url: Optional[str] = None,
264:         workload_manager_url: Optional[str] = None,
265:         session_id: Optional[str] = None,
266:         namespace: str = "default",
267:         code_interpreter_name: str = "code-interpreter",
268:         auth_token: Optional[str] = None,
269:         timeout: float = DEFAULT_TIMEOUT,
270:         connect_timeout: float = DEFAULT_CONNECT_TIMEOUT,
271:     ):
272:         self.router_url = router_url or os.environ.get("ROUTER_URL")
273:         if not self.router_url:
274:             raise ValueError("Router URL must be provided via argument or ROUTER_URL environment variable")
275: 
276:         self.namespace = namespace
277:         self.code_interpreter_name = code_interpreter_name
278:         self.timeout = timeout
279:         self.connect_timeout = connect_timeout
280:         self.session_id = session_id
281: 
282:         self.control_plane: Optional[ControlPlaneClient] = None
283:         self.data_plane: Optional[CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient] = None
284:         self._owns_session = session_id is None
285: 
286:         if session_id:
287:             self._init_data_plane()
288:         else:
289:             self.control_plane = ControlPlaneClient(
290:                 workload_manager_url=workload_manager_url,
291:                 auth_token=auth_token,
292:                 timeout=timeout,
293:                 connect_timeout=connect_timeout,
294:             )
295:             try:
296:                 self.session_id = self.control_plane.create_session(
297:                     name=code_interpreter_name,
298:                     namespace=namespace,
299:                 )
300:                 self._init_data_plane()
301:             except Exception as e:
302:                 logger.warning("Failed to create session: %s", e)
303:                 if self.session_id:
304:                     self.control_plane.delete_session(self.session_id)
305:                 self.session_id = None
306:                 raise
307: 
308:     def _init_data_plane(self):
309:         """Initialize the data plane client."""
310:         self.data_plane = CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient(
311:             session_id=self.session_id,
312:             router_url=self.router_url,
313:             namespace=self.namespace,
314:             code_interpreter_name=self.code_interpreter_name,
315:             timeout=self.timeout,
316:             connect_timeout=self.connect_timeout,
317:         )
318: 
319:     def execute_command(
320:         self,
321:         command: List[str],
322:         timeout: Optional[float] = None,
323:         working_dir: Optional[str] = None,
324:         env: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
325:     ) -> Dict:
326:         """Execute a command in the sandbox."""
327:         if not self.data_plane:
328:             raise SessionError("Data plane not initialized")
329:         return self.data_plane.execute_command(command, timeout, working_dir, env)
330: 
331:     def run_code(self, code: str, language: str = "python", timeout: Optional[float] = None) -> Dict:
332:         """Run code in the sandbox."""
333:         language = language.lower()
334:         if language in ("python", "py", "python3"):
335:             timestamp = int(time.time())
336:             file_path = f"/tmp/code_{timestamp}.py"
337:             self.write_file(file_path, code.encode("utf-8"))
338:             return self.execute_command(["python3", file_path], timeout=timeout)
339:         else:
340:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported language: {language}")
341: 
342:     def write_file(self, path: str, content: bytes, mode: str = "0644") -> Dict:
343:         """Write a file to the sandbox."""
344:         if not self.data_plane:
345:             raise SessionError("Data plane not initialized")
346:         return self.data_plane.write_file(path, content, mode)
347: 
348:     def upload_file(self, path: str, file_path: str, mode: str = "0644") -> Dict:
349:         """Upload a file to the sandbox."""
350:         if not self.data_plane:
351:             raise SessionError("Data plane not initialized")
352:         return self.data_plane.upload_file(path, file_path, mode)
353: 
354:     def download_file(self, path: str) -> bytes:
355:         """Download a file from the sandbox."""
356:         if not self.data_plane:
357:             raise SessionError("Data plane not initialized")
358:         return self.data_plane.download_file(path)
359: 
360:     def list_files(self, path: str) -> Dict:
361:         """List files in a directory."""
362:         if not self.data_plane:
363:             raise SessionError("Data plane not initialized")
364:         return self.data_plane.list_files(path)
365: 
366:     def stop(self):
367:         """Stop the session and clean up resources."""
368:         if self.data_plane:
369:             self.data_plane.close()
370:             self.data_plane = None
371: 
372:         if self.control_plane and self._owns_session and self.session_id:
373:             self.control_plane.delete_session(self.session_id)
374:             self.control_plane.close()
375:             self.control_plane = None
376:             self.session_id = None
377: 
378:     def __enter__(self):
379:         return self
380: 
381:     def __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb):
382:         self.stop()
383:         return False
384:

"""AgentCube SDK clients for Code Interpreter and Agent Runtime sessions."""

import base64
import json
import logging
import os
import time
from contextlib import contextmanager
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
from urllib.parse import urljoin

import requests
from requests.adapters import HTTPAdapter
from urllib3.util.retry import Retry

from agentcube.exceptions import CommandExecutionError, SessionError

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 120

input.content:
# AgentCube Implementation Plan

## Overview

This document provides a detailed implementation plan for Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033, mapping to the specification documents in `./specs/`. Each AR includes file paths, precise logic, and implementation details.

---

## AR-023: Session Store

**Spec Reference:** `specs/session-store/spec.md`, `specs/session-store/design.md`

### Status: IMPLEMENTED

### Files Created/Modified:

| File | Status | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | EXISTS | Store interface definition |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | EXISTS | Redis implementation |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | EXISTS | Valkey implementation |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | EXISTS | ErrNotFound error |

### Key Logic:

**Store Interface (`pkg/store/store.go`):**
```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

**Redis Implementation (`pkg/store/store_redis.go`):**
- Key patterns: `session:{id}`, `session:expiry`, `session:last_activity`
- Uses `TxPipelined` for atomic operations
- Environment: `REDIS_ADDR` (required), `REDIS_PASSWORD` (required unless `REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false`)

**Valkey Implementation (`pkg/store/store_valkey.go`):**
- Same key patterns as Redis
- Uses `DoMulti` for atomic operations
- Environment: `VALKEY_ADDR` (comma-separated), `VALKEY_PASSWORD`, `VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE`, `VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE`

**Singleton Pattern:**
- `Storage()` function with `sync.Once` initialization
- `STORE_TYPE` environment variable selects provider (default: `redis`)

---

## AR-024: Common Types

**Spec Reference:** `specs/sandbox-orchestration/design.md` (types section)

### Status: IMPLEMENTED

### Files Created/Modified:

| File | Status | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `pkg/common/types/types.go` | EXISTS | Core type definitions |

### Key Logic:

**Kind Constants:**
```go
const (
    AgentRuntimeKind    = "AgentRuntime"
    CodeInterpreterKind = "CodeInterpreter"
    SandboxKind         = "Sandbox"
    SandboxClaimsKind   = "SandboxClaim"
)
```

**SandboxInfo Struct:**
```go
type SandboxInfo struct {
    Kind             string              `json:"kind"`
    SandboxID        string              `json:"sandboxId"`
    SandboxNamespace string              `json:"sandboxNamespace"`
    Name             string              `json:"name"`
    EntryPoints      []SandboxEntryPoint `json:"entryPoints"`
    SessionID        string              `json:"sessionId"`
    CreatedAt        time.Time           `json:"createdAt"`
    ExpiresAt        time.Time           `json:"expiresAt"`
    Status           string              `json:"status"`
}

type SandboxEntryPoint struct {
    Path     string `json:"path"`
    Protocol string `json:"protocol"`
    Endpoint string `json:"endpoint"`
}
```

**Request/Response Types:**
```go
type CreateSandboxRequest struct {
    Kind      string `json:"kind"`
    Name      string `json:"name"`
    Namespace string `json:"namespace"`
}

func (car *CreateSandboxRequest) Validate() error

type CreateSandboxResponse struct {
    SessionID   string              `json:"sessionId"`
    SandboxID   string              `json:"sandboxId"`
    SandboxName string              `json:"sandboxName"`
    EntryPoints []SandboxEntryPoint `json:"entryPoints"`
}
```

---

## AR-025: API Errors

**Spec Reference:** `specs/sandbox-orchestration/design.md` (api section)

### Status: IMPLEMENTED

### Files Created/Modified:

| File | Status | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `pkg/api/errors.go` | EXISTS | API error helpers |

### Key Logic:

```go
const (
```

## AR-028: AgentD (Idle Cleanup Controller)

**Spec Reference:** `specs/idle-cleanup/spec.md`, `specs/idle-cleanup/design.md`

### Status: IMPLEMENTED

### Files Created/Modified:

| File | Status | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `pkg/agentd/reconciler.go` | EXISTS | Sandbox reconciler |
| `cmd/agentd/main.go` | EXISTS | AgentD binary entrypoint |

### Key Logic:

**Constants:**
```go
var SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
```

**Reconcile Algorithm:**
1. Get Sandbox by NamespacedName
2. If NotFound → return `ctrl.Result{}, nil`
3. Read annotation `last-activity-time` (from `workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey`)
4. If annotation missing/empty → return `ctrl.Result{}, nil`
5. Parse timestamp with `time.RFC3339`
6. If parse error → return `Result{RequeueAfter: 30s}, err`
7. Calculate `expirationTime = lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)`
8. If `time.Now().After(expirationTime)`:
   - Delete Sandbox (ignore NotFound)
   - Return `ctrl.Result{}, nil`
9. Else:
   - Return `Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil`

**Manager Setup (`cmd/agentd/main.go`):**
```go
mgr, err := ctrl.NewManager(ctrl.GetConfigOrDie(), ctrl.Options{
    Scheme:                 schemeBuilder,
    Metrics:                metricsserver.Options{BindAddress: "0"},
    HealthProbeBindAddress: "0",
})
```

**SessionManager:**
- Requires `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` environment variable
- Reads service account token from `/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token`
- Creates sandbox via POST to workload manager when session missing
- Loads existing session from store

**JWT Manager:**
- Generates RS256 tokens with 5-minute expiration
- Creates/loads identity secret `picod-router-identity` in namespace from `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE`
- Secret contains `private.pem` and `public.pem` keys

**Forwarding Headers:**
- `X-Forwarded-Host`
- `X-Forwarded-Proto` (https if TLS, else http)
- `X-Forwarded-For` (appends client IP)
- `x-agentcube-session-id` (response header)

**Error Mapping:**
- `connection refused` → 502 `{"error":"sandbox unreachable"}`
- `timeout` → 504 `{"error":"sandbox timeout"}`
- Other → 502

**GVR Variables:**
```go
var (
    AgentRuntimeGVR = schema.GroupVersionResource{
        Group: "runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh", Version: "v1alpha1", Resource: "agentruntimes",
    }
    CodeInterpreterGVR = schema.GroupVersionResource{
        Group: "runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh", Version: "v1alpha1", Resource: "codeinterpreters",
    }
    SandboxGVR = schema.GroupVersionResource{
        Group: "agents.x-k8s.io", Version: "v1alpha1", Resource: "sandboxes",
    }
    SandboxClaimGVR = schema.GroupVersionResource{
        Group: "extensions.agents.x-k8s.io", Version: "v1alpha1", Resource: "sandboxclaims",
    }
)
```

**Sandbox Creation Flow:**
1. Generate UUID for sessionID and sandboxID
2. Store placeholder SandboxInfo
3. Register one-shot watcher
4. Create Sandbox CR
5. Wait up to 2 minutes for running status
6. Resolve pod IP
7. Build entry points
8. Update SandboxInfo in store
9. Return CreateSandboxResponse

**Garbage Collection:**
- Runs every 15 seconds
- Lists inactive sandboxes (cutoff: `now - 15m`)
- Lists expired sandboxes (cutoff: `now`)
- Batch limit: 16
- Single tick timeout: 2 minutes

**Authentication (optional):**
- TokenReview validation when `EnableAuth=true`
- Token cache: 1000 entries, 5-minute TTL
- Stores token, username, service account info in context

| `-port` | 8080 | API port |
| `-runtime-class-name` | kuasar-vmm | Runtime class |
| `-enable-tls` | false | Enable TLS |
| `-tls-cert` | "" | TLS cert path |
| `-tls-key` | "" | TLS key path |
| `-enable-auth` | false | Enable auth |

### Key Logic:

**Public Exports:**
```python
from agentcube.client import CodeInterpreterClient, AgentRuntimeClient

__version__ = "0.1.0"
__all__ = ["CodeInterpreterClient", "AgentRuntimeClient"]
```

**Exceptions:**
```python
class AgentCubeError(Exception): pass
class CommandExecutionError(AgentCubeError):
    def __init__(self, exit_code: int, stderr: str, command: list): ...
class SessionError(AgentCubeError): pass
class DataPlaneError(AgentCubeError): pass
```

**ControlPlaneClient:**
- Environment: `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` (required)
- Auth: Token from argument or `/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token`
- Default timeouts: read=120s, connect=5.0s
- Methods: `create_session()`, `delete_session()`, `close()`

**CodeInterpreterClient:**
- Environment: `ROUTER_URL` (required)
- Context manager support (`__enter__`/`__exit__`)
- Methods: `execute_command()`, `run_code()`, `write_file()`, `upload_file()`, `download_file()`, `list_files()`, `stop()`
- Session header: `x-agentcube-session-id`

**AgentRuntimeClient:**
- Bootstraps session ID via GET to invocation URL
- Reads `x-agentcube-session-id` from response header
- Method: `invoke(payload, headers, timeout)`
- Context manager support

**HTTP Configuration:**
- Connection pooling: 10 connections, 100 max
- Retry: 3 attempts, backoff factor 1, status codes 502/503/504
- Read timeout buffer: +2.0 seconds for execute commands
